mapper.insert: INSERT INTO lookbook_tb (lookbook_id, member_id, char_name, char_image, char_class, char_world, char_level, title) VALUES (lookbook_seq.NEXTVAL, #{memberId}, #{charName}, #{charImage}, #{charClass}, #{charWorld}, #{charLevel}, #{title})
mapper.select: SELECT l.lookbook_id, l.member_id, l.char_name, l.char_image, l.char_class, l.char_world, l.char_level, l.title, l.reg_date, l.like_count, 0 AS liked_by_me, m.name AS writer_name FROM lookbook_tb l JOIN member_tb m ON l.member_id = m.member_id ORDER BY l.like_count DESC, l.reg_date DESC

SELECT l.lookbook_id, l.member_id, l.char_name, l.char_image, l.char_class, l.char_world, l.char_level, l.title, l.reg_date, l.like_count, CASE WHEN #{memberId} > 0 AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM lookbook_like_tb ll WHERE ll.lookbook_id = l.lookbook_id AND ll.member_id = #{memberId} ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS liked_by_me, m.name AS writer_name FROM lookbook_tb l JOIN member_tb m ON l.member_id = m.member_id ORDER BY l.like_count DESC, l.reg_date DESC
SELECT lookbook_id, member_id, char_name, char_image, char_class, char_world, char_level, title, reg_date FROM lookbook_tb WHERE member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY reg_date DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM lookbook_tb WHERE lookbook_id = #{lookbookId} AND member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.select: SELECT char_class AS "charClass", COUNT(*) AS "cnt" FROM lookbook_tb GROUP BY char_class ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
SELECT char_world AS "charWorld", COUNT(*) AS "cnt" FROM lookbook_tb GROUP BY char_world ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM lookbook_like_tb WHERE lookbook_id = #{lookbookId} AND member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lookbook_like_tb WHERE lookbook_id = #{lookbookId} AND member_id = #{memberId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lookbook_like_tb WHERE lookbook_id = #{lookbookId}
